commit_scope: Turn the native mutation front-door flip into a local A/B observation gate before ordinary public mutation traffic can move.

commands: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py
local_validation.summary: deploy/kernel-router/mutation_ab_observation_harness.py now runs local A/B observation over five native mutation preview routes. Variant A omits X-Form-Native-Preview and must fan out to FastAPI; variant B sends X-Form-Native-Preview and must return native-kernel SQL preview with executes:false. The harness observed 5/5 passing cases, confidence 1.0, gate_pass true, and recommendation promote_to_live_db_trial while ordinary_traffic_flip_performed and ordinary_traffic_flip_allowed stayed false.

known_limitations.observed: The A/B gate observes and recommends only. It does not move ordinary no-header POST/PATCH/DELETE traffic off FastAPI.
The treatment side remains SQL preview with executes:false. Live PostgreSQL mutation proof is still required before public execution.
Mutation response projection, cache invalidation, parent/edge repair, and contributor-key audit side effects remain explicit next evidence.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of the native mutation A/B observation gate commit and GitHub checks on PR #2586.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted. This slice intentionally keeps the front-door flip blocked until live DB and side-effect evidence exists.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The mutable idea/spec native preview flip is now an observed A/B gate: ordinary traffic remains fanout-python, preview traffic remains native-kernel observation, and the only passing recommendation is a live DB trial.
test_flows: Variant A no header -> X-Form-Router:fanout-python and mock upstream sees the same method, path, and body
Variant B with X-Form-Native-Preview -> X-Form-Router:native-kernel, status 202, native_preview:true, executes:false, expected operation, expected node_id, and expected graph table SQL fragments

python3 deploy/kernel-router/mutation_ab_observation_harness.py --json -> confidence 1.0, gate_pass true, ordinary_traffic_flip_performed false, ordinary_traffic_flip_allowed false, recommendation promote_to_live_db_trial

cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py -> 23 passed

phase_gate.reason: The observation gate is complete and confident, but public mutable front-door execution still needs live DB proof, response projection parity, cache/edge side-effect proof, and contributor-key audit side-effect proof.
